reviews.review_description: You don't know what too do no tutorial

reviews.review_title: Great space flight controls! Looks good
reviews.review_description: I'd buy a full version with more varied areas. The flight mechanics are already top notch and ate very intuitive. It feels like Descent. Only problem I encountered was an audio glitch every few minutes.
I actually absolutely loved this game. The graphics look great and the firefly sounding music makes me want to just fly and relax. NEED A FULL VERSION.

This is the best of the 8 games released today and it's in the concepts section. Crazy. I hope that means a full game is coming soon. Would like the option for arcade controls as the realistic controls are quite difficult but overall, this is a great experience.

reviews.review_title: Great concept needs alot of work
reviews.review_description:
I love the concept of this game and it's exstreamly well done. I found alot of bugs. For example I use the SteelSeries XL and soon as the game launches my chain gun won't stop firing on its own. Tried to restart the game numerous times same result. Another thing is how sluggish the game feels when to try to speed up move around try to evade incoming fire I feel like I'm fling a tank size of an aircraft carrier with agility of a sloth. I even have few gripes about how slow changing your weapons around in to to slow and some of the other weapons are useless when you close to an enemy it just Flys past them instead of hitting them. I didn't have the patience to sit through the whole game with my guns firing when I not clicking the buttons till there empty to takes forever to maneuver your craft. I love the game concept and way it looks and what I expect what the designers are going for make me feel a great deal of hope. I know they can pull it off but the question remains will them and listen to honest feed back I hope so.  Ps to the game company and designers please update the website you list under the developers. It's a useless website basically a legal page stating we are not liable for this and that lol I just wanted a way to email you guys so you get my message directly. I hope you read this comment and take it to heart. Thanks for your hard work can't wait to see what comes up next with this game.  

Cheers,

Oculus account ID is rbohannon89
Greate game .would bi nice if u can move or install it to SDcard

Love both the atmosphere and the flight mechanics. This isn't just a pick up and play sorta game. It's got a decent learning curve before you get the hang of it. Fully intend to buy the full version on payday. Good job on this.
The game is good but the controls are very intuitive but once you get used to them it's a very good game

Love the flight mechanics, its challanging! Great sim!
Had an issue with sound cutting out but i reinstalled and disabled Viper4Ansroid and all is working perfectly now. 

Thanks for the feast game dev:)
This demo convinced me to buy the game. Very fun to play, easily worth the $2 for the full game.
